Jobs at ASLC

Current opening - Lead Pastor Position

We are prayerfully seeking a Spirit-filled, full-time Pastor to provide spiritual leadership preach and teach God’s Word, shepherd the congregation, and equip believers for discipleship and service.

The Pastor will serve as both spiritual leader and ministry partner, working collaboratively with the Church Council, ministry leaders, and congregation to nurture spiritual growth and advance the mission of the church.

 

Apply Now
